homepage.heroSubline: Durable flooring solutions built for Atlanta homes. Expert installation and unparalleled service.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Atlanta Floors for Over a Decade
aboutText: Pro Flooring 323 started with a simple goal: to provide Atlanta homeowners with flooring solutions that last. We understand the unique challenges our local climate and housing stock present, and we've built our business on tackling them head-on.
Our approach is straightforward: quality materials, meticulous installation, and transparent communication. We believe in doing the job right the first time, every time. No shortcuts, no compromises.
We’re invested in the Atlanta community. From sponsoring local youth sports teams to partnering with Habitat for Humanity, we believe in giving back to the city that's given us so much.

services.name: Hardwood Flooring
services.shortDescription: Classic hardwood installation and refinishing for Atlanta homes.
services.description:
Hardwood flooring adds timeless elegance and value to any Atlanta property. We specialize in the installation, repair, and refinishing of hardwood floors, using only the highest quality materials sourced for our humid climate. From traditional oak to exotic hardwoods, we offer a wide selection to match your style and budget.

Our installation process includes careful subfloor preparation to prevent issues caused by Atlanta's red clay soil and fluctuating humidity levels. We meticulously sand, stain, and finish your floors to perfection, ensuring a durable and beautiful surface that will last for years to come.

Refinishing your existing hardwood floors can breathe new life into your home. We use dustless sanding techniques to minimize disruption and create a cleaner environment. Our team can match existing stains or create a custom color to perfectly complement your décor. Whether your floors are worn, scratched, or simply outdated, we can restore them to their original glory.

faq.question: How long does hardwood flooring installation take?
faq.answer: Installation time varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but typically takes between 3-5 days. Refinishing can usually be completed in 2-3 days.

faq.question: What type of hardwood is best for Atlanta's climate?
faq.answer: Engineered hardwood is often recommended for Atlanta due to its stability in humid conditions. However, solid hardwoods like oak and maple can also perform well with proper installation and maintenance.

faq.question: How often should I refinish my hardwood floors?
faq.answer: The frequency of refinishing depends on foot traffic and wear, but typically every 7-10 years is recommended to maintain their beauty and protect the wood.

services.name: Laminate Flooring
services.shortDescription: Affordable and durable laminate flooring solutions for Atlanta homes.
services.description:
Laminate flooring is a cost-effective and versatile option for Atlanta homeowners seeking a durable and stylish alternative to hardwood. It's resistant to scratches, stains, and fading, making it ideal for high-traffic areas and homes with pets or children.

We offer a wide variety of laminate styles, colors, and textures to suit any décor. From realistic wood-look planks to contemporary tile designs, we can help you find the perfect laminate flooring to enhance your home's aesthetic.

Our expert installation ensures a seamless and long-lasting finish. We properly prepare the subfloor to prevent moisture issues and ensure a level surface. Laminate flooring is easy to maintain, requiring only regular sweeping and occasional damp mopping.
benefits: Wide Variety of Styles and Colors

faq.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faq.answer: While most laminate flooring is water-resistant, some newer products are specifically designed to be waterproof, making them suitable for bathrooms and kitchens.

faq.question: How long does laminate flooring last?
faq.answer: With proper care and maintenance, laminate flooring can last for 10-20 years.

faq.question: Can I install laminate flooring myself?
faq.answer: While DIY installation is possible, professional installation ensures a proper and long-lasting finish, preventing issues like buckling or warping.

services.name: Vinyl Flooring
services.shortDescription: Waterproof and stylish vinyl flooring options for Atlanta bathrooms and kitchens.
services.description:
Vinyl flooring is a popular choice for Atlanta bathrooms, kitchens, and basements due to its waterproof and moisture-resistant properties. It's also a comfortable and quiet flooring option, making it ideal for families with children.

We offer a wide selection of vinyl flooring styles, including luxury vinyl plank (LVP) and luxury vinyl tile (LVT), which mimic the look and feel of hardwood and tile. These options are durable, easy to clean, and resistant to scratches and stains.

Our expert installation ensures a watertight seal, preventing water damage and mold growth. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a seamless and professional finish that will last for years to come.
process: Step 1: Moisture Testing and Subfloor Prep

faq.question: Is vinyl flooring suitable for basements?
faq.answer: Yes, vinyl flooring is an excellent choice for Atlanta basements due to its moisture-resistant properties.

faq.question: What is the difference between LVP and LVT?
faq.answer: LVP (Luxury Vinyl Plank) mimics the look of hardwood planks, while LVT (Luxury Vinyl Tile) mimics the look of ceramic or stone tile.

faq.question: How do I clean vinyl flooring?
faq.answer: Vinyl flooring can be easily cleaned with a damp mop and mild detergent. Avoid using abrasive cleaners or harsh chemicals.

services.name: Tile Flooring
services.shortDescription: Durable and elegant tile flooring installation for Atlanta homes.
services.description:
Tile flooring offers a timeless and durable solution for Atlanta homes. Perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, and entryways, tile is resistant to water, stains, and scratches, making it ideal for high-traffic areas.

We specialize in the installation of ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone tile. From classic subway tile to intricate mosaic patterns, we can create a custom design that reflects your personal style.

Our expert tile setters ensure a precise and level installation, using high-quality mortars and grouts to prevent cracking and water damage. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a flawless finish that will last for years to come.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation and Material Selection

faq.question: What type of tile is best for a bathroom?
faq.answer: Porcelain tile is an excellent choice for bathrooms due to its water resistance and durability.

faq.question: How do I clean tile grout?
faq.answer: Tile grout can be cleaned with a grout brush and a mixture of baking soda and water. For stubborn stains, use a grout cleaner specifically designed for tile.

faq.question: Can I install tile over existing flooring?
faq.answer: In some cases, tile can be installed over existing flooring, but it's important to ensure that the subfloor is level and stable.

services.name: Carpet Installation
services.shortDescription: Comfortable and stylish carpet installation services for Atlanta homes.
services.description:
Carpet provides warmth, comfort, and sound absorption to any Atlanta home. Ideal for bedrooms, living rooms, and playrooms, carpet creates a cozy and inviting atmosphere.

We offer a wide selection of carpet styles, colors, and textures to suit any décor. From plush Berber to durable Saxony, we can help you find the perfect carpet to meet your needs and budget.

Our expert installers ensure a seamless and wrinkle-free installation, using high-quality padding to extend the life of your carpet and enhance its comfort. We properly stretch and secure the carpet to prevent bunching and ensure a long-lasting finish.
process: Step 3: Precise Carpet Installation and Stretching
benefits: Wide Variety of Styles and Colors

faq.question: What type of carpet is best for high-traffic areas?
faq.answer: Berber carpet is a durable and stain-resistant option for high-traffic areas.

faq.question: How often should I clean my carpets?
faq.answer: Carpets should be professionally cleaned every 12-18 months to remove dirt, allergens, and stains.

faq.question: What is the best way to remove stains from carpet?
faq.answer: Blot stains immediately with a clean, dry cloth. Avoid rubbing, which can spread the stain. Use a carpet stain remover specifically designed for the type of stain.

services.name: Floor Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Expert floor repair for all flooring types in Atlanta.
services.description:
Atlanta's climate and active households can take a toll on floors. Pro Flooring 323 specializes in repairing all types of flooring, from hardwood and laminate to vinyl and tile. Whether you have water damage, scratches, cracks, or loose boards, we can restore your floors to their original condition.

Our experienced technicians assess the damage and recommend the most effective repair solution. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a seamless and long-lasting repair. For hardwood floors, we can replace damaged boards, sand, and refinish to match the existing color and finish. For laminate and vinyl floors, we can repair or replace damaged planks or tiles. For tile floors, we can repair cracks, replace broken tiles, and re-grout to prevent water damage.

Don't let damaged floors detract from the beauty and value of your home. Contact Pro Flooring 323 for expert floor repair services.

faq.question: How do I know if my floors need repair?
faq.answer: Signs of floor damage include cracks, water stains, loose boards or tiles, scratches, and uneven surfaces.

faq.question: Can you match the existing color and finish of my hardwood floors?
faq.answer: Yes, our experienced technicians can match the existing color and finish of your hardwood floors to ensure a seamless repair.

faq.question: How long does floor repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of floor repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of flooring. We provide an estimated timeline during the initial assessment.

services.name: Subfloor Installation and Repair
services.shortDescription: Ensuring a solid foundation with expert subfloor services in Atlanta.
services.description:
A stable subfloor is crucial for the longevity and performance of any flooring system. In Atlanta, the red clay soil can cause foundation shifts, leading to subfloor issues. Pro Flooring 323 provides expert subfloor installation and repair services to ensure a solid foundation for your new or existing floors.

We inspect your subfloor for signs of damage, such as moisture, rot, cracks, and unevenness. We then recommend the appropriate repair or replacement solution. Our services include leveling, reinforcing, and moisture-proofing subfloors to prevent future problems. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and stable subfloor.

Whether you're installing new flooring or experiencing problems with your existing floors, Pro Flooring 323 can help you create a solid foundation that will last for years to come.

faq.question: Why is subfloor important?
faq.answer: The subfloor provides a stable and level surface for your flooring. It also helps to prevent moisture damage and extend the life of your floors.

faq.question: How do I know if my subfloor needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs of subfloor damage include squeaky floors, uneven surfaces, moisture stains, and rot.

faq.question: What are the different types of subfloor?
faq.answer: Common types of subfloor include plywood, OSB (oriented strand board), and concrete.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Pro Flooring 323 did an amazing job installing new hardwood floors in my Virginia-Highland bungalow. The team was professional, efficient, and the floors look fantastic. They even helped me choose a stain that perfectly complemented my existing trim. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David B.
reviews.text: We had Pro Flooring 323 install laminate flooring in our basement. The price was fair, and the installation was quick. There was a small issue with a damaged plank, but they came back and replaced it promptly. Overall, a good experience.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: I hired Pro Flooring 323 to tile my kitchen backsplash. The result is stunning! They paid attention to every detail and made sure the grout lines were perfect. The whole team was a pleasure to work with.

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: After a pipe burst, our hardwood floors suffered water damage. Pro Flooring 323 came to the rescue! They repaired the damaged boards and refinished the entire floor. You can't even tell there was ever any damage. Excellent work!

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: Pro Flooring 323 installed new carpet in our bedrooms. The installation was quick and efficient. The carpet feels great underfoot. My only minor complaint is that there was a small delay in scheduling the installation.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: Excellent service from start to finish! The team at Pro Flooring 323 helped us select the perfect hardwood floors for our living room and installed them with precision and care. Our home looks completely transformed. We highly recommend their services!
